verses.1: Better is a dry morsel and quietness with it Than a house full of feasting with strife.
verses.2: A servant who acts wisely will rule over a son who acts shamefully, And will share in the inheritance among brothers.
verses.3: The refining pot is for silver and the furnace for gold, But the LORD tests hearts.
verses.4: An evildoer listens to wicked lips; A liar pays attention to a destructive tongue.
verses.5: One who mocks the poor taunts his Maker; One who rejoices at disaster will not go unpunished.
verses.6: Grandchildren are the crown of the old, And the glory of sons is their fathers.
verses.7: Excellent speech is not fitting for a fool, Much less are lying lips to a prince.
verses.8: A bribe is a charm in the sight of its owner; Wherever he turns, he prospers.
verses.9: One who conceals an offense seeks love, But one who repeats a matter separates close friends.
verses.10: A rebuke goes deeper into one who has understanding Than a hundred blows into a fool.
verses.11: A rebellious person seeks only evil, So a cruel messenger will be sent against him.
verses.12: Let a person meet a bear robbed of her cubs, Rather than a fool in his foolishness.
verses.13: One who returns evil for good, Evil will not depart from his house.
verses.14: The beginning of strife is like letting out water, So abandon the quarrel before it breaks out.
verses.15: One who justifies the wicked and one who condemns the righteous, Both of them alike are an abomination to the LORD.
verses.16: Why is there money in the hand of a fool to buy wisdom, When he has no sense?
verses.17: A friend loves at all times, And a brother is born for adversity.
verses.18: A person lacking in sense shakes hands And becomes guarantor in the presence of his neighbor.
verses.19: One who loves wrongdoing loves strife; One who makes his doorway high seeks destruction.
verses.20: One who has a crooked mind finds nothing good, And one who is corrupted in his language falls into evil.
verses.21: He who fathers a fool does so to his sorrow, And the father of a fool has no joy.
verses.22: A joyful heart is good medicine, But a broken spirit dries up the bones.
verses.23: A wicked person accepts a bribe from an inside pocket To pervert the ways of justice.
verses.24: Wisdom is in the presence of one who has understanding, But the eyes of a fool are on the ends of the earth.
verses.25: A foolish son is a grief to his father, And bitterness to her who gave birth to him.
verses.26: It is also not good to fine the righteous, Nor to strike the noble for their uprightness.
verses.27: One who withholds his words has knowledge, And one who has a cool spirit is a person of understanding.
verses.28: Even a fool, when he keeps silent, is considered wise; When he closes his lips, he is considered prudent.
